# Udderly Abduction - Scale Up & Laser Overhaul

## Context
The game is working but sprites are too small (UFO 11x8, cows 8x8, farmers 7x8), the UFO feels sluggish, and farmer projectiles (arcing pitchforks, spread pellets) don't reliably reach the UFO. The user wants:
- **All sprites redrawn at 2x size** with more detail
- **UFO moves faster** to feel snappy at the larger scale
- **Farmers shoot direct laser beams** instead of arcing projectiles

**Only `game.js` is modified.** `audio.js` and `index.html` stay unchanged.

---

## Changes Overview

### 1. Redraw All Sprites at 2x

Every sprite doubles in both dimensions. The extra pixels add detail (smoother curves, shading).

| Sprite | Old Size | New Size |
|--------|----------|----------|
| UFO | 11x8 | 22x16 |
| UFO Shield | 11x8 | 22x16 |
| Cow (x3 variants) | 8x8 | 16x16 |
| Farmers (x3 types) | 7x8 | 14x16 |
| Heart | 5x5 | 10x10 |
| Power-ups (x5) | 7x5 | 14x10 |
| Pitchfork projectile | 7x5 | (removed - replaced by laser) |

**Method**: Mechanically double each pixel to a 2x2 block, then hand-refine edges/curves.

### 2. Increase UFO Speed
- Base speed: **90 -> 140** px/s
- Speed boost multiplier stays 1.5x (so boosted = 210 px/s)

### 3. Replace Projectiles with Direct Lasers

All farmers now shoot straight-line laser beams (no gravity, no arcs):

| Farmer Type | Laser Style | Color | Speed |
|-------------|-------------|-------|-------|
| Pitchfork | Single beam (4px wide, 8px tall) | Green `#44cc44` | 0.8x base |
| Shotgun | 3 parallel beams (3px wide, 6px tall, offset 6px apart) | Yellow `#ffff44` | 0.9x base |
| Sniper | Thin fast beam (2px wide, 8px tall) + solid red warning line | Red `#ff4444` | 1.6x base |

Base projectile speed formula: `90 + level * 10` (up from `60 + level * 8`)

### 4. Adjust All Positioning for 2x Sprites

| Value | Old | New | Why |
|-------|-----|-----|-----|
| Visual ground top | H-22 (248) | H-32 (238) | Taller ground strip |
| Cow/Farmer ground Y | H-30 (240) | H-48 (222) | 16px entities stand on ground |
| Hills base offsets | H-30, H-22 | H-40, H-32 | Match raised ground |
| Ground decorations Y | H-23 | H-33 | Above ground |
| UFO Y max bound | H-80 (190) | H-90 (180) | Keep above ground zone |
| UFO starting pos | (W/2-5, 40) | (W/2-11, 40) | Center 22px UFO |
| Beam base width | 24 / 36(magnet) | 36 / 52(magnet) | Proportional to UFO |
| Shield hitbox padding | 3px | 5px each side | Proportional |
| Cow scared proximity | 50px | 70px | Larger entities |
| Cow wrap margins | 15px | 20px | Wider off-screen |
| Cow spawn offset | 8px | 16px | Match 16px cow |
| Farmer spawn offset | 7px | 14px | Match 14px farmer |
| Farmer right bound | W-12 | W-18 | 14px width + margin |

### 5. HUD Layout Adjustments

- HUD bar height: 14 -> 18px (bigger heart sprites)
- Heart spacing: 7px -> 12px (10px heart + 2px gap)
- Energy bar shifts right to accommodate bigger hearts
- Score/Level/Cows text positions shift right accordingly
- 5x5 pixel font stays at scale 1 (still readable)

### 6. Particle & Effects

- Default particle size: 1 -> 2px
- Collect particle count: 12 -> 16
- Hit particle count: 8 -> 10
- Cow moo bubble Y offset: -8 -> -12 (above taller cow)
- Sniper laser sight: dotted line -> solid semi-transparent red line

---

## Implementation Order (in game.js)

1. Replace all `SPRITES` entries with 2x versions
2. Update `createUFO` dimensions/speed, `createCow` dimensions, `createFarmer` dimensions
3. Update `createProjectile` for laser beam dimensions
4. Update `getLevelConfig` projectile speed formula
5. Update ground/terrain rendering constants
6. Update UFO bounds clamping
7. Update beam width values
8. Replace farmer shooting logic (remove arcs, add direct lasers)
9. Remove pitchfork gravity from `updateProjectiles`
10. Update cow/farmer spawn positions and boundary checks
11. Update shield hitbox padding
12. Replace `renderProjectiles` with laser beam rendering
13. Replace sniper laser sight with solid line
14. Adjust HUD layout positions
15. Update menu UFO centering
16. Bump particle sizes
17. Adjust cow personality effect positions (moo bubble, sweat drop)

## Verification
- Open `index.html` in browser
- All sprites should appear ~2x larger and more detailed
- UFO should move noticeably faster
- Farmers should shoot colored laser beams in straight lines toward UFO
- Shotgun farmer fires 3 parallel beams
- Sniper shows solid red warning line before firing
- HUD hearts and energy bar should look proportional
- All collisions (beam-cow, laser-UFO, shield-laser, powerup-UFO) still work correctly
- Ground entities should stand properly on the terrain

---

## Udderly Abduction - Game Summary

**Genre:** Retro pixel-art 2D arcade game, played in the browser (HTML5 Canvas + Web Audio API)

**Premise:** You pilot a UFO abducting cows from a field while farmers try to shoot you down.

### Files
- `index.html` — Minimal shell, loads the two scripts
- `audio.js` — Procedural audio engine (Web Audio API, no audio files). Generates all sounds: beam hum, cow moos, weapon sounds, UFO laser pew, farmer death explosion, jingles, etc.
- `game.js` — Entire game engine (~2600 lines). Includes: pixel font renderer, sprite data, input system, entity factories, game state machine, update/render loop, HUD, particles, leaderboard (localStorage)

### Resolution & Rendering
- Internal resolution: 480x270, scaled 3x to 1440x810 display
- All rendering done on an offscreen canvas, blitted to display canvas with nearest-neighbor scaling
- Custom 5x5 pixel font for all text
- Sprites defined as character grids with palette lookups

### Core Mechanics
- **UFO Movement:** WASD/Arrows, speed 336 px/s (boosted 504 with powerup), full screen freedom including ground level
- **Tractor Beam (Space):** Activates beam below UFO. Cows caught in beam float straight up. UFO must physically touch the floating cow to collect it. Miss it and the cow floats off the top — one chance only.
- **UFO Laser (F key):** Heat-seeking green laser that locks onto nearest farmer and steers toward them. Kills farmers for +50 points.
- **Shield (Shift — toggle on/off):** Force field that blocks farmer projectiles. Drains energy while active.
- **Energy System:** Beam and shield drain energy. Energy regens when idle. Depleted = forced cooldown.

### Entities
- **Cows (24x24 hitbox, drawn at 1.5x):** 3 variants (normal, walking, scared). Run fast (80-120 px/s) back and forth across the full screen width, bouncing at edges. Spawn from edges and middle. Collected cows heal the UFO +1 HP.
- **Farmers (21x24 hitbox, drawn at 1.5x):** 3 types — Pitchfork, Shotgun, Sniper. March back and forth with bob animation. Spawn from edges and middle. Shoot laser beams at the UFO.
- **Farmer Projectiles:** Colored laser beams (green/yellow/red). Mostly straight shots, occasional slight angle variation. Long lifetime (8s). No gravity — pure straight lines.
- **Powerups (14x10):** Health, Energy, Shield, Magnet (wider beam), Speed. Spawn high up when cows are collected.

### Farmer Types
| Type | Laser Color | Behavior |
|------|-------------|----------|
| Pitchfork | Green #44cc44 | Single beam, 0.8x speed |
| Shotgun | Yellow #ffff44 | 2-3 beams with slight spread, 0.9x speed |
| Sniper | Red #ff4444 | Fast single beam (1.6x), red warning line before firing |

### Progression
- **Seamless level transitions** — no pause between levels, all entities persist
- Level config scales: more cows needed, more/faster farmers, new farmer types unlock at level 3 and 5
- Combo system: collect cows quickly for bonus points
- Score popups, particles, screen shake, hitstop on damage
- Leaderboard saved to localStorage (top 10)

### Visual Style
- 4 themed biomes cycling: Prairie, Desert, Night, Snowfield
- Parallax hills, animated clouds, ground decorations
- Stars visible in Night theme
- All sprites are 2x detailed pixel art (UFO 22x16, cows/farmers 16x16 base drawn at 1.5x)

### Controls
| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| WASD/Arrows | Move UFO |
| Space | Tractor beam |
| F | Shoot heat-seeking laser |
| Shift | Toggle shield |
| P | Pause |
| M | Mute |
